zh.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin de Insula是Geoffrey de Insula和Isolda de Albermarla的兒子，於1270年6月24日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆。他於大約1301年與Joan在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特加可姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin de Insula was born on 24 June 1270, in Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Geoffrey de Insula and Isolda de Albermarla. He married Joan about 1301, in Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1307, at the age of 37.

ko.of Gatcombe, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 가트코브

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin de Insula(은)는 1270년 6월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 가트코브에서 Geoffrey de Insula(와)과 Isolda de Albermarla의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 가트코브에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin de Insula родился 24 июня 1270 г. в местности гаткомб, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Geoffrey de Insula и Isolda de Albermarla. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1301 г. в местности гаткомб, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1307 г. в возрасте 37 лет.
